rationale: Both candidates investigate the exact same code path the human reviewer questioned (source_outputs[0] as parent, hunyuan_image3.py:118) and confirm it via the orchestrator's [output, *companions] construction, but neither surfaces the reviewer's actual ask to add a defensive check/comment. Y edges out on recall by also raising a test-coverage gap in the spirit of Bounty-hunter's benchmark-validation request, and gives tighter, evidence-cited file/line findings, though one finding (missing outputs[0] guard) is framed as diff-introduced when it's pre-existing, slightly hurting precision. X is cleaner and more precise but stays purely confirmatory and misses both the benchmark-run ask and the precommit comment entirely.
